presets.title: Embaras — 1r trimestre (conservador)
presets.description: Generator-mode preset for first trimester. Conservative distribution prioritizing pelvic stability, hip mobility and gentle core. Always consult a healthcare professional.
presets.notes: Conservative first-trimester block; may help maintain baseline fitness. Consult a healthcare professional before and throughout pregnancy.

presets.title: Embaras — 2n trimestre (força moderada)
presets.description: Faithful-mode preset for second trimester. Moderate strength focus: glutes, hip stabilizers and upper body. Conservative progression. Always consult a healthcare professional.
presets.notes: Second-trimester block that may help maintain strength and posture. Avoid supine positions after 20 weeks if discomfort arises. Always consult a healthcare professional.

presets.title: Embaras — 3r trimestre (manteniment suau)
presets.description: Generator-mode preset for third trimester. Very gentle maintenance: mobility, hip stabilizers and low-impact core. Always consult a healthcare professional.
presets.notes: Very gentle maintenance block for the third trimester. Movement may help manage common discomforts; always consult a midwife or physiotherapist.

presets.title: Postpart — Retorn al trail (progressiu)
presets.description: Progressive 8–12 week block bridging postpartum strength to trail-specific demands: eccentric control on descents, reactive stability and hip power. Full medical clearance required before starting.
presets.notes: Aimed at postpartum runners returning to trail; may help rebuild eccentric strength and reactive stability. Progress conservatively and monitor symptoms throughout.

presets.title: Postpart — Corredora general (força base)
presets.description: Progressive 6–12 week block for postpartum runners: rebuilds lower-body strength, core stability and running-specific resilience. Medical clearance required.
presets.notes: General-purpose postpartum running strength block; may contribute to restoring load tolerance for running. Increase intensity conservatively.

sessions.label: Sessió B — Tren superior i core

embaras_1r_trimestre_v1.name: Embaràs — 1r trimestre (conservador)
embaras_1r_trimestre_v1.description: Bloc conservador en mode generador per al primer trimestre. Prioritza l'estabilitat pèlvica, la mobilitat de maluc i el core suau. Consulteu un professional sanitari.

embaras_2n_trimestre_v1.name: Embaràs — 2n trimestre (força moderada)
embaras_2n_trimestre_v1.description: Bloc fidel de força moderada per al segon trimestre: glutis, estabilitzadors i tren superior. Progressió conservadora. Consulteu un professional sanitari.

embaras_3r_trimestre_v1.name: Embaràs — 3r trimestre (manteniment suau)
embaras_3r_trimestre_v1.description: Bloc de manteniment molt suau per al tercer trimestre: mobilitat, estabilitzadors i core de baix impacte. Consulteu una llevadora o fisioterapeuta.

postpart_retorn_trail_v1.name: Postpart — Retorn al trail (progressiu)
postpart_retorn_trail_v1.description: Bloc de 8–12 setmanes que connecta la força postpart amb les demandes del trail: control excèntric en baixades, estabilitat reactiva i potència de maluc. Cal alta mèdica.

postpart_corredora_general_v1.name: Postpart — Corredora general (força base)
postpart_corredora_general_v1.description: Bloc de 6–12 setmanes per a corredores postpart: reconstrueix la força del tren inferior, l'estabilitat del core i la resistència específica per córrer. Cal alta mèdica.

embaras_1r_trimestre_v1.name: Embarazo — 1er trimestre (conservador)
embaras_1r_trimestre_v1.description: Bloque conservador en modo generador para el primer trimestre. Prioriza estabilidad pélvica, movilidad de cadera y core suave. Consulte con un profesional sanitario.

embaras_2n_trimestre_v1.name: Embarazo — 2º trimestre (fuerza moderada)
embaras_2n_trimestre_v1.description: Bloque fiel de fuerza moderada para el segundo trimestre: glúteos, estabilizadores y tren superior. Progresión conservadora. Consulte con un profesional sanitario.

embaras_3r_trimestre_v1.name: Embarazo — 3er trimestre (mantenimiento suave)
embaras_3r_trimestre_v1.description: Bloque de mantenimiento muy suave para el tercer trimestre: movilidad, estabilizadores y core de bajo impacto. Consulte con una matrona o fisioterapeuta.

postpart_retorn_trail_v1.name: Postparto — Retorno al trail (progresivo)
postpart_retorn_trail_v1.description: Bloque de 8–12 semanas que conecta la fuerza posparto con las demandas del trail: control excéntrico en bajadas, estabilidad reactiva y potencia de cadera. Se requiere alta médica.

postpart_corredora_general_v1.name: Postparto — Corredora general (fuerza base)
postpart_corredora_general_v1.description: Bloque de 6–12 semanas para corredoras posparto: reconstruye fuerza de tren inferior, estabilidad del core y resistencia específica para correr. Se requiere alta médica.

embaras_1r_trimestre_v1.name: Pregnancy — 1st trimester (conservative)
embaras_1r_trimestre_v1.description: Generator-mode conservative block for the first trimester. Prioritizes pelvic stability, hip mobility and gentle core. Always consult a healthcare professional.

embaras_2n_trimestre_v1.name: Pregnancy — 2nd trimester (moderate strength)
embaras_2n_trimestre_v1.description: Faithful-mode moderate strength block for the second trimester: glutes, stabilizers and upper body. Conservative progression. Always consult a healthcare professional.

embaras_3r_trimestre_v1.name: Pregnancy — 3rd trimester (gentle maintenance)
embaras_3r_trimestre_v1.description: Very gentle generator-mode maintenance block for the third trimester: mobility, hip stabilizers and low-impact core. Consult a midwife or physiotherapist.

postpart_retorn_trail_v1.name: Postpartum — Return to trail (progressive)
postpart_retorn_trail_v1.description: An 8–12 week block bridging postpartum strength to trail-specific demands: eccentric control on descents, reactive stability and hip power. Full medical clearance required.

postpart_corredora_general_v1.name: Postpartum — General runner (strength base)
postpart_corredora_general_v1.description: A 6–12 week block for postpartum runners: rebuilds lower-body strength, core stability and running-specific resilience. Medical clearance required.
